next_steps: Send stool for Clostridium botulinum toxin and spore culture
Administer Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BabyBIG) as soon as possible
Perform a thorough dermatologic examination to rule out an embedded tick
Obtain serum for lead level and metabolic screening
Monitor respiratory status closely with frequent blood gas analysis
Continue supportive care including nutritional support and secretion management
